# Plan: Update Documentation and README for Project Introduction and Onboarding

## Summary

Add, update, and remove documentation and README content to align with software industry standards, introduce the product, and guide new members to join the project

## Tasks

1. Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README
2. Update docs/product-overview.md to Align with Industry Standards and Introduce AI Coding Agent (depends on: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README)
3. Revise docs/contribution-guide.md to Include Clear New Member Onboarding Instructions (depends on: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README)
4. Update docs/ai-agent.md to Reflect Current AI Coding Agent Practices and Standards (depends on: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README)
5. Revise docs/user-guide.md to Include Onboarding and AI Feature Usage Guidance (depends on: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README)
6. Update README.md to Introduce Product and Guide New Members (depends on: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README)
